## Summary

Describe the operator-visible change and why it is needed.

## Verification

- [ ] I ran the relevant tests and static checks.
- [ ] I tested the affected import, provider, TTS, playback, or deployment path.

## Release-sensitive review

- [ ] This preserves existing functionality, or links an approved removal proposal with a migration path.
- [ ] I documented any new network destination, data sent, credential, retention, and disablement control.
- [ ] I recorded licence/provenance for new code, assets, models, fixtures, or generated media.
- [ ] I considered security, privacy, and upgrade impact.
- [ ] I did not add books, audio, voice references, operator data, or secrets.
